text: - (a) Contractor shall not be liable to Subcontractor for any delay, disruption, hindrance or interference to the Subcontract Work resulting from the act, negligence or default of the Owner or the Architect, or any engineer, construction manager or lender for the Project, or by reason of fire or other casualty, or on account of riots, strikes or other combined action of the workmen or others, or on account of any acts of God or any other cause beyond Contractor's reasonable control, or on account of any circumstances caused or contributed to by this Subcontractor.
